message:
feat(demo_showcase): syntax highlighting + line numbers toggle (bd-3d87)

Add runtime toggles for Docs page rendering options:
- `s` toggles syntax highlighting (uses Ascii style when disabled)
- `#` toggles line numbers in code blocks
- Header shows toggle status: [S#] when both on, [··] when both off
- Respects glamour's syntax-highlighting feature flag

Add line_numbers config option to Config struct.
Add tests for toggle behavior and default states.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
